Department.name: Occupational Psychologists
Department.description: applies evidence-based psychological principles and research to improve the performance, well-being, and satisfaction of individuals and groups within an organization

Department.name: Management
Department.description: directing, planning, and organizing a specific business unit's operations and personnel to achieve company goals efficiently

Department.name: Finance
Department.description: making financial decisions for internal and external affairs

Department.name: Recruitment
Department.description: sourcing, attracting, screening, interviewing, hiring, and onboarding top talent

Department.name: Sells
Department.description: responsible for identifying prospects, nurturing client relationships, and closing deals to sell products or services
